MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein, with settlement authority, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michelle Goden is present.
Attorney Frederick G. Herold representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
